scenarios.name: No token must not access profit report
scenarios.description: Public unauthenticated request must be rejected.

scenarios.name: Invalid token must not access profit report
scenarios.description: Invalid bearer token must be rejected.

scenarios.name: Cashier must not access profit report
scenarios.description: Cashier role must not access owner-level profit report.

scenarios.name: Cashier must not access cost price data
scenarios.description: Cashier must not read cost price or margin-sensitive data.

scenarios.name: Admin must not access owner-only settings
scenarios.description: Admin should not access owner-only configuration.

scenarios.name: Tenant user must not access another tenant products
scenarios.description: Authenticated tenant A owner must not access tenant B product data.
